test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lag_perf_t ( MetricName LowCardinality(String), TimeUnix UInt64, Count UInt64, Attributes Map(LowCardinality(String), String) ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (MetricName, TimeUnix) SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lag_perf_t SELECT concat('metric_', toString(number % 50)), number * 1000, number, map('k1', toString(number % 20)) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.query: SELECT sum(prev_count) FROM ( SELECT lagInFrame(Count) OVER (PARTITION BY MetricName, Attributes ORDER BY TimeUnix) AS prev_count FROM lag_perf_t ) SETTINGS query_plan_reuse_storage_ordering_for_window_functions = 0 FORMAT Null

SELECT sum(prev_count) FROM ( SELECT lagInFrame(Count) OVER (PARTITION BY MetricName, Attributes ORDER BY TimeUnix) AS prev_count FROM lag_perf_t ) SETTINGS query_plan_reuse_storage_ordering_for_window_functions = 1, max_threads = 4 FORMAT Null
